questionHtml:
The magnitude of the resultant of two forces acting on a body is 12 N. Which pair of forces acting on the body can combine to produce this resultant?

A.  1 N and 2 N

B.  1 N and 14 N

C.  5 N and 6 N

D.  6 N and 7 N

meta.title: The magnitude of the resultant of two forces acting on a body is 12 N. Which pair of forces acting on the body can combine to produce this resultant? A. 1 N and 2 N B. 1 N and 14 N
